description: Ming and Qing ancient architectural complex, now the Wenmiao District of Zhengzhou Museum, showcasing ancient educational culture.
Zhengzhou's renowned comprehensive shopping center, offering a full range of brands and integrated shopping and dining experiences.
The core scenic lake of Zhengdong New District CBD, famous for its nighttime light shows.
A professional museum fully showcasing the history and culture of Yellow River governance.
Ecological wetland park in Zhengdong New District, featuring beautiful surroundings ideal for leisure walks and sightseeing.
Large cultural theme park on the southern bank of the Yellow River, offering elevated views of the river and a chance to experience Yellow River culture.
A landmark square in downtown Zhengzhou, with the Erqi Memorial Tower as a symbolic architectural icon of the city.
One of China's first national first-class museums, showcasing the finest of Central Plains culture with a rich collection of artifacts.
A modern comprehensive museum featuring cultural exhibitions themed around Zhengzhou's local history and culture.
The ruins of the Shang Dynasty capital from 3600 years ago, the earliest surviving ancient city walls in China.
